headline: Why Motorola Solutions (MSI) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of public safety technology company Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) fell 2.8% in the afternoon session after U.S. equities traded lower as escalating geopolitical tensions between the U.S. and Iran pushed oil prices above $100 a barrel, rattling investor confidence.

headline: 3 Reasons We Love Motorola Solutions (MSI)
summary: Motorola Solutions has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 0.6% while holding steady at $451.55.

headline: Citrini's Election Trade Unwinds As Longs And Shorts Converge — Trump Alpha Wiped Out
summary:
In March 2024, independent investment research firm Citrini Research — founded in 2023 by James van Geelen — built a long/short market-neutral basket to trade the 2024 U.S. presidential election. 



The basket held long positions in stocks expected to benefit from a Republican win and short positions in names exposed to Democratic policy priorities.

headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) Vs The Rest Of The Safety & Security Services Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at safety & security services stocks, starting with Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI).
